docs.title: AboutMian Arham Haroon
docs.text:
About me

I am a Computer Science student focused on SQL, analytics, and practical database-driven systems. I build workflows that turn operational data into clear reports, dashboards, and useful business insights.

Analytics Focus

Data cleaning, exploratory analysis, SQL reporting, dashboards, and business intelligence workflows.

Database Systems

SQLite, PostgreSQL, Supabase, database design, query optimization, and reporting backends.

Practical Builds

Inventory systems, DUKAN reporting modules, data analysis projects, and workflow automation.

docs.title: ProjectsProjects that combine practical data thinking, reliable systems, and measurable business value.
docs.text:
Selected work

These are my own projects, built to solve real business and academic problems through Python, SQL, databases, reporting workflows, and analytical problem solving. Each project reflects a different part of my technical approach: data analysis, operational automation, desktop applications, and structured reporting.

Python • SQLite • SQL Business Analytics DUKAN App

A business analytics and reporting system designed to reflect real retail operations, from sales and inventory to customer credit and operational oversight.

What I built
  • Designed a structured database model for sales, inventory, customer credits, and reporting needs.
  • Built SQL-based reporting workflows for invoice summaries, stock monitoring, and performance tracking.
  • Created analytics modules that turn transaction data into usable business insights.
  • Structured the system around practical reporting rather than simple record storage.
Impact

This project demonstrates my ability to build data-oriented systems that support day-to-day decision making, especially in retail-style environments where reporting and visibility matter.

View repository Placeholder screenshot 1 Placeholder screenshot 2 Placeholder screenshot 3 Python • SQLite • Tkinter Desktop Application Inventory Management System

A desktop-based inventory control solution focused on stock tracking, CRUD workflows, and practical warehouse operations.

What I built
  • Developed a relational SQLite database for inventory records and product management.
  • Implemented full CRUD operations for adding, updating, deleting, and searching products.
  • Built a Tkinter-based interface to make record management accessible and structured.
  • Included workflow logic for tracking stock movement and maintaining consistent records.
Impact

This project highlights my ability to create operational tools that improve data organization and reduce manual handling of inventory information.

View repository Placeholder screenshot 1 Placeholder screenshot 2 Placeholder screenshot 3 Python • SQLite Academic Systems Student Management System

A database-driven application for managing student records, academic data, and structured information retrieval in a clear and scalable format.

What I built
  • Created a database schema for storing student information and academic records.
  • Implemented CRUD operations for student data management and record updates.
  • Added search, filtering, and organization logic for navigating academic records efficiently.
  • Designed the project around practical data handling for recurring administrative tasks.
Impact

This project reflects my approach to building reliable systems for data entry, organization, and long-term maintainability in academic settings.

View repository Placeholder screenshot 1 Placeholder screenshot 2 Placeholder screenshot 3 Python • Pandas • Matplotlib Data Analysis Olympics Web Data Analysis Project

A data analysis project that turns Olympic datasets into structured insights through data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and visual storytelling.

What I built
  • Cleaned and prepared Olympic datasets with Pandas for consistent analysis.
  • Performed exploratory data analysis to uncover patterns across countries, sports, and performance.
  • Created visual outputs using Matplotlib to communicate trends clearly.
  • Focused on turning raw data into understandable analysis rather than surface-level summaries.
Impact

This project reflects my interest in analytical thinking, presentation of findings, and building insights from publicly available data in a way that is useful and interpretable.

View repository Placeholder screenshot 1 Placeholder screenshot 2 Placeholder screenshot 3

docs.title: SkillsSkills for data-driven solutions, reporting systems, and analytics workflows.
docs.text:
Technical toolkit

Building data-driven solutions, business reporting systems, and analytics workflows focused on solving operational and business problems.

Data Analytics

Analyze structured and raw datasets to identify trends, generate insights, and support business decision-making.

Python Pandas NumPy EDA Data cleaning Data transformation Statistical analysis SQL & Database Engineering

Design relational databases, write optimized SQL queries, perform joins and aggregations, and build efficient backend reporting workflows.

SQL SQLite PostgreSQL Supabase Database design Query optimization Data modeling Business Reporting & Intelligence

Develop reporting systems that monitor business operations and provide measurable insights for performance tracking.

Sales reporting Inventory reporting Customer analytics Invoice reporting KPI tracking Dashboard development Business intelligence Application Development

Build database-connected applications with structured backend workflows and complete data management systems.

CRUD development Python Tkinter Postman Backend logic Search systems Workflow automation Data Processing & Automation

Prepare, clean, transform, and automate datasets for analytics workflows and business reporting systems.

Data processing Data cleaning Data transformation Automation Workflow optimization Reporting pipelines Developer Workflow

Maintain organized development workflows using modern development and version control tools.

Git GitHub VS Code Jupyter Notebook Postman DUKAN App Analytics Module Built sales, inventory, customer credit, invoice, and dashboard reporting with SQLite and SQL. Business Data Analysis Cleaned datasets, performed EDA, applied SQL aggregation, and created Matplotlib reports. Inventory Management System Developed CRUD, search, stock monitoring, and inventory reports using Python, SQLite, and Tkinter.

Certifications

Verified learning proof

Certificates supporting the Python and SQL foundation used across analytics and reporting projects.

IBM Cognitive Class Python for Data Science View Certificate IBM Cognitive Class SQL and Relational Databases 101 View Certificate Simplilearn SkillUp Introduction to SQL View Certificate Education BS Computer Science, Government College University Faisalabad. CGPA 3.54 / 4.00. Best fit Data analyst, analytics engineer, SQL developer, and reporting-focused roles. Strength Turning operational data into reports, dashboards, and measurable business insights.

docs.title: TestimonialsWhat people say about working with me
docs.text:
Voices

Mentors, peers, and collaborators often describe me as curious, dependable, and eager to turn ideas into practical solutions.

“ Arham is one of the most enthusiastic students I’ve worked with. His ability to grasp technical concepts quickly and apply them in real-world projects like the Retail Management System is impressive. Dr. Imran Khalid Computer Science Lecturer, Riphah International University “ Arham brings energy and precision to every project. His knowledge of Python and database integration helped us build a reliable system with confidence. Arham Haroon Project Collaborator, Retail Management System “ Arham is a fast learner and a great team player. He often leads study discussions, simplifies complex topics, and motivates others to explore more. Irfan Malik Study Group Member, Data Science Study Circle “ Arham was punctual, professional, and a quick learner. His attention to detail and communication skills made him a valuable part of our team. Saeed Ahmed Former Supervisor, Baba Tikka Kohinoor Let’s connect

If we’ve worked together, studied together, or built something side by side, I’d love to hear from you.

Get in touch
